extensionDescription.message: A no-fuss way to save and restore batches of tabs as bookmarks.

whenToolbarClicked.message: When the toolbar button is clicked:

showInSidebar.message: show the stash in the sidebar

showInTab.message: show the stash in a tab

showInPopup.message: show the stash in a popup

whenStashingFromMenu.message: When stashing tabs from the context menu or address bar:

showStashInSidebar.message: Show the stash in the sidebar

showStashInTab.message: Show the stash in a tab

newFolderTimeoutTitle.message: If the top-most group has a name, or is older than this, a new, unnamed group will be created instead.

appendToTopGroupPrefix.message: Append to the top-most group only if it was created in the last

showOpenTabsTitle.message: Click on the "Open Tabs" or "Unstashed Tabs" title to toggle between these options. Note that pinned tabs are never shown.

whenDeletingItems.message: When deleting items from your stash:

rememberDeletedItemsPrefix.message: Remember items that were deleted on this computer for

onceTabStashed.message: Once a tab has been stashed:

afterStashingTabHideTitle.message: Hidden tabs that are still loaded can be restored instantly. They also preserve anything you had entered into the tab and its history (e.g. Back button).

hideKeepLoaded.message: Hide the tab and keep it loaded in the background

autoDiscardHiddenTitle.message: Monitors the total number of tabs in your browser, and if you have a lot of tabs open, unloads hidden tabs that haven't been used recently. This option significantly reduces memory usage and is recommended for most users.

autoUnloadHidden.message: Automatically unload hidden tabs that haven't been used in a while

checkHiddenEvery.message: Check for old hidden tabs every

hiddenVisibleLoaded.message: hidden and visible tabs loaded at all times

keepOldestLoaded.message: Keep the oldest tabs loaded for at least

unloadMoreAggressively.message: ...unload tabs more aggressively if there are more than

afterStashingTabHideDiscardTitle.message: Hidden tabs that are unloaded can be restored very quickly, and usually without a network connection. They also preserve browsing history (e.g. Back button). However, depending on the website, you may lose anything you had entered into the tab that isn't already saved. Uses less memory.

hideImmediatelyUnload.message: Hide the tab and immediately unload it

afterStashingTabCloseTitle.message: Uses the least amount of memory and takes the longest to restore, because tab contents may need to be fetched over the network. This option will cause the browser to forget anything you had entered into the tab, as well as the tab's browsing history (e.g. Back button).

whenOpeningFromStash.message: When opening tabs from the stash:

loadLazily.message: Wait for a tab to be selected before loading it

confirmCloseTabs.message: Confirm when closing a lot of open tabs

experimentalFeaturesWarning.message: WARNING: Turning on experimental features may break Tab Stash or cause data loss! They are "experimental" because they are still in development and/or there may be known issues. Experimental features may change significantly or be removed entirely in future versions.

experimentalFeaturesFeedback.message: To provide feedback or report a problem with a feature, leave a comment on the issue linked in [brackets] below.

restoreRecentlyClosedTabsDesc.message: When restoring tabs, if a hidden tab isn't available, search for and re-open recently-closed tabs with matching URLs. (NOTE: This is known to occasionally restore incorrect tabs on certain versions of Firefox, check the linked issue for more details.)

showStashedTabsInTabTitle.message: Show stashed tabs in a tab

hideAllTabsTitle.message: Hide all tabs so only group names are showing

whatsNewNotification.message: Tab Stash $1$ has new sorting options and a refreshed look to match Firefox's new sidebar styling. See what else is new!

deletedItemsShow.message: Deleted $1$ items. Show what was deleted?

search_tooltip_fmt.message:
$1$, $2$
$3$ in this window ($4$ open, $5$ unloaded, $6$ hidden)

hideTabsForGroup.message: Hide the tabs for this group

stashAllOpenTabsTooltip.message: Stash all open tabs to a new group (hold $1$ to keep tabs open)

stashAllUnstashedTabsTooltip.message: Stash all unstashed tabs to a new group (hold $1$ to keep tabs open)

showAllOpenTabsTooltip.message: Show all open tabs in the window (excluding pinned tabs)

closeUnstashedTabsTooltip.message: Close all unstashed tabs (except pinned and hidden)

closeStashedTabsTooltip.message: Close all stashed tabs (except pinned and hidden)

closeAllOpenTabsTooltip.message: Close all open tabs (except pinned and hidden)

closeHiddenTabsTooltip.message: Close any stashed tabs that are hidden (may reclaim memory)

moveTabsToNewGroup_one.message: Move $1$ tab to a new group (hold $2$ to copy)

moveTabsToNewGroup_many.message: Move $1$ tabs to a new group (hold $2$ to copy)

closeTabsWarn_one.message: You're about to close $1$ tab at once.

closeTabsWarn_many.message: You're about to close $1$ tabs at once.

closeTabsIrreversible.message: Your browser may not keep this many tabs in its recent history, so THIS IS IRREVERSIBLE. Are you sure?

toggleCollapsedGroupTooltip.message: Hide the tabs for this group (hold $1$ to hide tabs for child groups)

stashAllOpenTabsToGroupTooltip.message: Stash all (or highlighted) open tabs to this group (hold $1$ to keep tabs open)

stashActiveTabToGroupTooltip.message: Stash the active tab to this group (hold $1$ to keep tabs open)

openAllTabsInGroupTooltip.message: Open all tabs in this group (hold $1$ to open in background)

openAllTabsAndDeleteGroupTooltip.message: Open all tabs and delete this group (hold $1$ to open in background)

openAllTabsAndRemoveFromGroupTooltip.message: Open all tabs and remove them from this group (hold $1$ to open in background)

createNewSubGroupTooltip.message: Create a new sub-group within this group

stashTabsToNewChildGroupTooltip.message: Stash all open tabs to a new child group

stashTabsToNewChildGroupMenu.message: Stash Tabs to New Child Group

stashTabToGroupTooltip.message: Stash tab to this group (hold $1$ to keep tab open)

importIntoGroupTooltip.message: Import links and URLs into this group

exportFromGroupTooltip.message: Export links and URLs from this group

closeStashedTabsInGroupTooltip.message: Close any open tabs that are stashed in this group

deleteGroupTooltip.message: Delete the whole group and all its tabs and child groups

restoreURLWarningBold.message: Please make sure this URL looks right.

restoreURLWarningText.message: If it looks okay, you can restore the tab by copying and pasting the URL into the address bar:

importLabel.message: Paste anything containing links or URLs here. Links and URLs will be extracted and converted into bookmarks in your stash.

splitTabsOptionLabel.message: Split tabs into different groups on:

fetchIconsCheckbox.message: Fetch icons and titles from each site

importErrorAlert.message:
Info for the following URLs could not be fetched:

$1$

Stashed tabs for these URLs have been created anyway, but you may need to set their titles manually. Sorry about that!

noMatchingDeletedItems.message: No matching items were found. Your item may have been deleted on another computer, or outside of Tab Stash entirely.

noDeletedItemsYet.message: It doesn't look like you've deleted anything on this computer yet.

deletedItemsNotFoundHelp.message: Didn't find what you're looking for? It may have been deleted on another computer, or outside of Tab Stash entirely.

openBookmarkAndDeleteTooltip.message: Open this tab and delete it from the group (hold $1$ to open in background)

deleteBookmarkTooltip.message: Delete this tab from the group

stashTabTooltip.message: Stash this tab (hold $1$ to keep tab open)

unstashSelectedTooltip.message: Open tabs and delete them from the stash

deleteSelectedTooltip.message: Delete stashed tabs and close unstashed tabs

moveToNewGroupTooltip.message: Move to a new group (hold $1$ to copy)

moveToGroupSearchTooltip.message: Move to new group "$1$" (hold $2$ to copy)

welcomeIntro.message: Hi! Let's go through a couple quick questions to get you started. Don't worry—you can change your answers later in Tab Stash's options.

setupWhatToSave.message: What would you like to save when you click the toolbar button?

setupSaveAllOpen.message: Save all open tabs to the stash

setupSaveActive.message: Save the active tab to the stash

setupCantShowPopupNote.message: You can't show the popup and save tabs at the same time.

setupDontSaveAnything.message: Don't save anything to the stash

setupChooseShowOptionNote.message: Choose a different "Show..." option to enable this

setupWhatToSee.message: What would you like to see when you click the toolbar button?

setupShowSidebar.message: Show my stashed tabs in the sidebar

setupShowTab.message: Show my stashed tabs in a tab

setupShowPopup.message: Show my stashed tabs in a popup

setupPopupNote.message: To use the popup, choose "Don't save anything to the stash"

setupChooseSaveOptionNote.message: Choose a different "Save..." option to enable this

setupAddressBarContextStash.message: If you stash a tab using the address bar or context menu, what do you want to see?

setupAllSetNote.message: You're all set! You can close this tab.

setupThanksFooter.message: Thanks for trying out Tab Stash. I hope you enjoy it! —Josh

restoreLocalFileWarning.message: For security reasons, your browser won't allow Tab Stash to restore tabs that show files on your computer without your intervention.

restorePrivilegedWarning.message: For security reasons, your browser won't allow Tab Stash to restore privileged tabs without your intervention.

restoreURLWarning.message: Please make sure this URL looks right. If it looks okay, you can restore the tab by copying and pasting the URL into the address bar:

crashRecoverMsg.message: Oops! Something went wrong. Tab Stash will try to recover automatically.

crashOptionsHelp.message: Here are a few options that might help. Crash details are shown below for easy reference—they will be cleared once you close this notification.

crashReportWarnTooltip.message: Please search for similar issues before reporting a crash, to be sure you're not about to report a duplicate.

crashHideReportsHelp.message: If you're seeing too many crash reports, you can temporarily hide them:

crashHideSettingsNote.message: Crash reports can be turned on again in settings.
